airalo.name: Airalo
airalo.trackingNote: TODO-MIKE: fill after partners.airalo.com (Impact network) approval. Impact's own deep-link generator produces the full, already-encoded tracking URL for a given destination page — paste that whole URL here and only swap in {clickref} for whichever subid/sharedid parameter Impact assigns you. Do NOT hand-edit an already-encoded destination segment to inject {countrySlug} — if you want per-country destinations, generate one deep link per country in Impact's UI instead. Cookie window: confirm in the Impact dashboard (not published on Airalo's public affiliate page as of 2026-07).

saily.name: Saily
saily.trackingNote: TODO-MIKE: fill after saily.com/affiliate signup (Nord Security program, ~30-day cookie per public docs). Same rule as Airalo — paste Saily's own generated tracking link, only substitute {clickref} into their subid param, don't hand-encode a destination.

discoverCars.name: DiscoverCars
discoverCars.trackingNote: TODO-MIKE: fill awinmid after signup at partners.discovercars.com (AWIN), and set the shared awin.publisherId above from your AWIN account. buildAwinLink() combines awinmid + publisherId + destinationTemplate safely (percent-encoded) — do not hand-build a cread.php?...&ued=... string yourself.
